channel.title: Agents on A Hungry Fool
channel.description: Recent content in Agents on A Hungry Fool

item.title: Codex: History Aware Collaboration Tuning (HACT)
item.description: Coding agents are awesome. But have you experienced design or pattern drift across threads? Have you ever been frustrated when you mentioned something clearly in an earlier thread, but the agent totally forgot it in a new one? Wouldn't it be nice if the agent could review and learn your preferences, then apply them automatically? Here is my story, and a way to make it happen with the Codex "HACT" Skill.

item.title: Agents Rising: Turning Intelligence into Action
item.description: AI workflow automation company n8n’s $180M series-c funding and OpenAI’s recent announcement of Agent Builder show that industry values the plumbing of intelligence as much as the intelligence itself.

item.title: Agent With MBTI Personality
item.description: Researchers found that enhancing AI agents with MBTI personality can enhance the way agents act and make them more suitable for tasks in various scenarios.
